case_title: BANK ONE DELAWARE,N.A. VS. ROBERT J. WDOWIAK

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY WESTHAFER, F. EUGENE

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER BANK ONE DELAWARE, N.A.'S PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-03-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (AMENDED) ON NTC OF HEARING RE: PETITION TO CONFIRM, CORRECT OR VACATE CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD; MEMO OF PTS AND AUTHORITIES; [PROPOSED] ORDER; [PROPOSED] JUDGMENT FILED BY PETITIONER BANK ONE DELAWARE,N.A.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER BANK ONE DELAWARE,N.A. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT WDOWIAK, ROBERT J. $4,614.01 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $819.00 INTEREST, $412.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,645.61, SEE SCANNED DOC
